notes: Default runtime thresholds. Pass this file with --config configs/default.json.

features.torso_angle_degrees: 0 means vertical; larger values mean more horizontal.
features.vertical_velocity: Positive means the body center is moving downward in normalized image coordinates per second.
features.body_center_drop: Increase in body center y compared with the initial baseline.
features.aspect_ratio: Visible body bounding-box width divided by height.
